notes: Core mechanics work (shooting, splitting asteroids, wrapping, lives, levels) but ship is invisible during DEATH state and invulnerability flicker logic has a bug where ship doesn't render at all during DEATH gameState, drag is very low making ship feel slippery, and no UFO despite being declared.
Excellent core implementation with authentic wireframe visuals and synthesized sound effects, though it lacks the UFO enemy, hyperspace mechanic, and has frame-dependent drag.

Core Asteroids loop is present and mostly works, but missing classic features like hyperspace/UFO/highscore use plus awkward death rendering and some control/UI inconsistencies keep it from feeling polished.
